text.title: frameworks Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for frameworks as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Declaring VPC "fit" without checking pain-relievers against top-3 pains from actual interviews.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: VPC fit is always partial in reality. Over-claiming fit before launch leads to underinvestment in validation and a false sense of readiness.

failure-mode.description: LLMs hallucinate framework cells fluently; without a citation requirement the niche matrix becomes confidently wrong.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require citations; with a citation requirement the niche matrix becomes confidently wrong becomes grounds for rejection. The "estimate" tag signals which numbers need validation before acting on them.

failure-mode.description: Confirmation bias: if the user hints "this should be a $1B market" or "I love this idea", the agent reverse-engineers high scores.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-commit the scoring rubric before showing the hypothesis.

failure-mode.description: 7Ps duplication: the agent fills Pain/Profession/People with restatements of the same idea.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tag each idea with the underlying user-pain-id to enforce non-overlap.

failure-mode.description: Paul Graham introspection prompts ("what do you find yourself building?") force the agent to invent a personal project.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Skip these for agent runs or pipe in real user history.

failure-mode.description: Niche scoring drift: identical inputs to two agent runs produce 15+ point spread.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fix random seed or require a justification per cell to reduce variance.

failure-mode.description: JTBD wishful copywriting: "feel empowered" is not measurable; LLMs default to adjectives.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require a verifiable outcome ("invoice sent in <90s, paid within 14 days").

failure-mode.description: Stale training data: the model "knows" 2023 market sizes and 2022 competitor lists.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force fresh web fetches for anything post-cutoff.

failure-mode.description: Currency mixing: agents mix USD/EUR/GBP within one TAM report.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Normalize to USD with a dated FX rate.

failure-mode.description: VPC over-fit: the canvas always "fits" if the agent invented both sides.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require pains/gains sourced from interviews and pain-relievers from the spec.

failure-mode.description: Competitive table over-listing: agents add every adjacent product to appear thorough.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cap to direct + 1 indirect tier and tag the rest as "long tail".
